case_title: HAI TAO REN VS. 1220 LA PLAYA CONDOMINIUM ASSOCIATION

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT 1220 LA PLAYA CONDOMINIUM ASSOCIATION
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF DEFENDANT SERVICE FEE $0 SERVED FEB-28-2024, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO CROSS DEFENDANT REN, HAI TAO

DECLARATION OF DUE DILIGENCE IN ATTEMPTING SERVICE REMARKS: PER THE RESIDENT THE DEFENDANT DOES NOT LIVE AT LISTED ADDRESS. SERVICE FEE: $40 FILED BY PLAINTIFF REN, HAI TAO AS TO DEFENDANT 1220 LA PLAYA CONDOMINIUM ASSOCIATION
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVICE FEE $100 SERVED DEC-19-2023, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT 1220 LA PLAYA CONDOMINIUM ASSOCIATION
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-15-2024 - JUDGMENT.
CLAIM OF DEFENDANT FOR $475.00 FILED BY 1220 LA PLAYA CONDOMINIUM ASSOCIATION AS TO CROSS DEFENDANT REN, HAI TAO ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-15-2024 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAR-15-2024 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAR-15-2024 BY VISITING JUDGE. PLAINTIFF HAI TAO REN IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT 1220 LA PLAYA CONDOMINIUM ASSOCIATION IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY TERESA SPRY AND HUGH ZENG. PLAINTIFF IS ASSISTED BY CERTIFIED MANDARIN INTERPRETER HWA SHING (SHANNON) KWEI. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: SYLVIA HUSING; CLERK: D. CARTER. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-15-2024 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF REN, HAI TAO IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT 1220 LA PLAYA CONDOMINIUM ASSOCIATION STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $450.00 FILED BY REN, HAI TAO AS TO DEFENDANT 1220 LA PLAYA CONDOMINIUM ASSOCIATION ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR FEB-07-2024 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF FEB-07-2024 - CONTINUED FOR INCOMPLETE PROOF OF SERVICE TO MAR-15-2024 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF HAI TAO REN IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT 1220 LA PLAYA CONDOMINIUM ASSOCIATION IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY TERESA SPRY. PLAINTIFF WAS ASSISTED BY CERTIFED MANDARIN INTERPRETER AIDONG NI. PLAINTIFF'S PROOF OF SERVICE IS INCOMPLETE AND DID NOT SERVE THE CORRECT AGENT FOR SERVICE. DEFENDANT'S ACKNOWLEDGED SERVICE BUT DID NOT WAIVE SERVICE AND ASKED FOR A CONTINUANCE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: WILLIAM LYNN; CLERK: D. CARTER. NOT REPORTED.(D506)

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAR-15-2024 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAR-15-2024 BY VISITING JUDGE. PLAINTIFF HAI TAO REN IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT 1220 LA PLAYA CONDOMINIUM ASSOCIATION IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY TERESA SPRY AND HUGH ZENG. PLAINTIFF IS ASSISTED BY CERTIFIED MANDARIN INTERPRETER HWA SHING (SHANNON) KWEI. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: SYLVIA HUSING; CLERK: D. CARTER. NOT REPORTED.(D506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT CROSS COMPLAINANT 1220 LA PLAYA CONDOMINIUM ASSOCIATION IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY CROSS DEFENDANT REN, HAI TAO STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
